problem_statement: calc.add returns the difference instead of the sum. add(2, 3) should return 5 but returns -1. Fix calc.add so it adds its two arguments.

synthetic.canned_patch:
--- a/calc.py
+++ b/calc.py
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 def add(a, b):
-    # BUG: subtracts instead of adding
-    return a - b
+    # FIXED: add the two arguments
+    return a + b
